verses.1: Sing to the LORD a new song,
verses.2: The LORD has made known his salvation.
verses.3: He has remembered his loving kindness and his faithfulness toward the house of Israel.
verses.4: Make a joyful noise to the LORD, all the earth!
verses.5: Sing praises to the LORD with the harp,
verses.6: With trumpets and sound of the ram’s horn,
verses.7: Let the sea roar with its fullness;
verses.8: Let the rivers clap their hands.
verses.9: Let them sing before the LORD,
